raw_consumer_statement:
Our daughter went to an XXXX facility in XXXX, GA for medical care on XX/XX/XXXX and XXXX, 2024. They did not send her a bill. In less than a month, XXXX charged her credit card that she previously used without her knowledge or authorization this time. As the responsible party, I let Citi know of the issue and disputed the charges for being unauthorized. Although it is not Citi 's concern, the XXXX for XXXX 's medical care matched the amounts due ( {$120.00} and {$120.00} ) and I paid that bill with XXXX XXXX check # XXXX for {$240.00} and uploaded a copy of the check from XXXX XXXX online as proof of payment. Again, Citi was not even in the position to ask for proof of payment as the charges were unauthorized. XXXX put no effort into properly resolving the issue of payment. 

Citi allowed the dispute for {$120.00} but denied the dispute for {$120.00}. I can not get my head around their logic. I attempted to resolve with their online chat and was simply bounced from person to person until I gave up. No one there provided any help.
